analysis.name: Dell Technologies (Ondo Tokenized)
analysis.summary: DELLON是Ondo发行的代币化Dell股票，24小时涨幅6%，但链上DEX交易对（DELL/SOL）流动性极低（$2895），成交量仅$3.93，价格与真实DELL股票脱节。近期有新闻提及价格预测和介绍，但无实质利好。代币供应量极小（43.6枚），市值仅$1654，存在操纵风险。不建议买入。

recommendation.invalidation: 流动性改善至$100k以上且成交量放大

catalysts: DELL股票本身上涨可能带动DELLON

latestNews.title: Dell Technologies (Ondo Tokenized) Price: DELLON/USD Live Price Chart, Market Cap & News Today
Dell Technologies Tokenized Stock (Ondo) price today, DELLon to USD live price, marketcap and chart

fundamentals: DELLON是Ondo Finance发行的代币化Dell Technologies股票，1:1锚定DELL股票价格
总供应量43.6枚，流通量相同，无增发机制
项目官网为Ondo Finance，代币化资产受限于非美国用户
链上DEX交易对DELL/SOL在pumpswap上，流动性极低
marketRead: 24小时涨幅6%，但成交量仅$3.93，流动性$2895，极易被大单操纵
链上价格$0.000001657，与DELL股票实际价格（约$435）严重脱节，说明该DEX交易对并非真实反映DELL股票价值
CoinGecko上DELLON价格$435.46，市值$18,987，与DEX数据矛盾，可能存在多个不同合约或数据错误
risks: 流动性极低，滑点巨大，难以买卖
链上价格与真实股票价格脱节，存在定价错误风险
代币供应量极小，易被操纵
新闻均为中性，无实质利好驱动
DEX交易对可能为仿盘或假币，需谨慎
watchlist: DELLON在主流DEX（如Uniswap）上的流动性变化
Ondo官方是否承认该交易对
sourceNotes: CoinGecko和DEX数据不一致，需进一步核实
新闻来源为WEEX和CoinGecko/CoinMarketCap，权威性一般

profile.name: Dell Technologies (Ondo Tokenized)
profile.description: DELLon is the Ondo Tokenized version of Dell Technologies Inc, giving tokenholders economic exposure similar to holding DELL and reinvesting any dividends. Ondo tokenized stocks enable non-US retail and institutional users around the world to instantly mint and redeem tokenized U.S. stocks and ETFs, 24 hours a day, five days a week with full access to traditional exchange liquidity. Additional restrictions apply. Learn more at ondo.finance/global-markets.
